summary: Phase 2 BreezeFlow HVAC Management System testing completed. All 23 backend API tests pass. Frontend mobile technician dashboard, J-Load calculator, and role switching all working correctly.

fixed_during_testing.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not serializable - fixed by excluding _id field
MongoDB ObjectId not serializable - fixed by excluding _id field
Missing default value for duct_location field in ManualJLoadCalculation model - fixed by adding default

critical_code_review_comments: MongoDB _id fields should be consistently excluded from all API responses to prevent serialization errors
Pydantic models with Literal types should have default values to prevent validation errors when creating objects
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed get_truck_inventory and get_inventory_audit_log to exclude MongoDB _id
/app/backend/models.py - Added default value for duct_location in ManualJLoadCalculation
test_credentials: N/A - No authentication required for testing
seed_data_creation: Demo data loaded via 'Load Demo Data' button - includes 4 trucks, 14+ inventory items, 10 inventory categories, technicians, and jobs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features fully tested. Backend APIs for inventory, trucks, stock check, restock, J-Load calculator, and equipment usage all working. Frontend mobile technician dashboard accessible via Technician role + Mobile button. J-Load calculator shows results with cooling/heating BTU, tonnage recommendations, and equipment suggestions.

backend_apis: GET /api/trucks - Returns 4 demo trucks assigned to technicians ✓
GET /api/trucks/by-technician/{tech_id} - Get truck assigned to technician ✓
GET /api/truck-inventory/{truck_id} - Get truck inventory with items ✓
POST /api/truck-inventory/{truck_id}/add-item - Add item to truck inventory ✓
GET /api/stock-check/required/{tech_id} - Check if stock check is required ✓
POST /api/jload/quick-estimate - Calculate quick J-load estimate with climate zones ✓
POST /api/jload/manual-j - Create Manual J calculation draft ✓
POST /api/jload/manual-j/{id}/calculate - Run full Manual J calculation ✓
frontend_features: Mobile view toggle button in Technician role ✓
TechnicianMobileDashboard component shows greeting, time clock, quick actions ✓
J-Load Calculator sheet with Quick Estimate form and results display ✓
Role selector dropdown (Owner/GM, Dispatcher, Technician, Sales) ✓
Desktop Technician view with Shift Time Clock, Job Time Tracking, My Active Jobs ✓

mocked_apis_note: Route estimation uses Haversine formula, J-Load Quick Estimate uses simplified BTU/sq ft calculations, Manual J calculation uses simplified load formulas (not full ACCA method)
